title: Can't See Item Details in Externally Shared Board

posts.author: Kelderic (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
One feature that we’d really like is the ability to see (and deeplink to) item details in a publicly shared board. I can deeplink to Item details for logged-in users, using the following structure:

…/pulses/ItemID

However, adding that to a public shared URL doesn’t work.
